552 OPIOID_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD OPIOID_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD High-Drug Risk (Indication): Opioid (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was taking medication from the opioid class and whether there was an indication noted for all medications in the drug class. 0 = No
